9.93 Million Minutes Transcribed 99% Accuracy Guaranteed 13,933 + Registered Users Since 2004 Frequently Asked Questions What is a transcription service? A professional transcription service converts
A professional transcription service converts spoken language from audio or video recordings into written text. The process involves skilled transcriptionists who listen to the entire recordings and
who listen to the entire recordings and transcribe them accurately, capturing all of the spoken words and other relevant information while deciphering unclear speech. The resulting transcriptions can
unclear speech. The resulting transcriptions can be used for various purposes, such as documentation, accessibility, legal, and analysis of information. Where are your transcriptionists located? Is
